name: Tudor Gold Corp.
description: Tudor Gold Corp. is a junior precious and base metals exploration company with properties in British Columbia's Golden Triangle, an area that hosts producing and past-producing mines and several large deposits that are approaching potential development. The company's flagship project is the Treaty Creek property, in which it holds a 60% interest. Treaty Creek is located in the same geological district as the KSM and Brucejack deposits. Tudor Gold is focused on the exploration and development of gold, silver, and copper resources within its extensive claim holdings.
